description_long: This is a dark wooden table with a rectangular top and four robust, turned legs. The table features ornate carved detailing along the apron, especially visible on the longer sides, adding a touch of classic elegance. The legs are thick and rounded, tapering slightly towards the feet, and are symmetrically placed at each corner. The tabletop appears solid and flat, suitable for supporting various objects. The wood has a deep, rich finish, giving the table a stately and traditional appearance. Decorative cutouts and carvings beneath the tabletop further enhance its visual appeal.
description: A dark, ornately carved wooden table with a rectangular top and four turned legs, featuring decorative detailing along the apron.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the short end, showing two turned legs and a glimpse of the carved apron beneath the tabletop.
description_view_1: The table is viewed from the long side, highlighting the intricate carved detailing and all four legs.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite short end with two legs and the carved apron visible.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, displaying the long side with ornate carvings and all four legs.
